Package net.okocraft.box.api.event.stock

Class StockEvent

java.lang.Object
com.github.siroshun09.event4j.event.Event
net.okocraft.box.api.event.BoxEvent
net.okocraft.box.api.event.stockholder.StockHolderEvent
net.okocraft.box.api.event.stock.StockEvent
All Implemented Interfaces:
AsyncEvent
Direct Known Subclasses:
StockDecreaseEvent, StockIncreaseEvent, StockSetEvent
public class StockEvent extends StockHolderEvent implements AsyncEvent
A StockHolderEvent called when the stock of the StockHolder is modified.

You need to be very careful not to call methods that cause changes to a StockHolder in the event, as this may result in an infinite loop.
